admissions_process.summary: RHU graduate admissions are merit-based. Applicants submit the official graduate application, provide the required documents, meet the English requirement, and complete any graduate committee review or interview step when requested.
steps: Submit the required graduate documents and evidence of prior degree recognition/equivalence.
Meet the English entrance or competency requirement.
Complete any program committee review or interview step if requested.
Pay the non-refundable admission file fee.

required_documents.summary: RHU lists a graduate application package built around prior academic credentials, attested transcripts, English competency evidence, and recommendations.
items: Certified copy of undergraduate degree and equivalence from the Ministry of Higher Education
Official transcripts attested by the Ministry of Higher Education
Certified copy of Lebanese Official High School Certificate or equivalent
RHU English Entrance Exam or standardized English competency exam
Any additional documents listed in the Graduate Catalog and application package

language_requirements.summary: RHU requires proof of English proficiency for graduate admission through the RHU English Entrance Exam or another recognized English competency exam.
notes: The reviewed official sources do not expose a single numeric threshold in the source map summary.
Keep the requirement as a general English competency rule in shared data.

tuition_model.summary: RHU publishes a current graduate fee table with tuition charged per credit hour and differentiated by college.
notes: The 2025-2026 fee PDF shows College of Business Administration graduate tuition at USD 200 per credit hour.
The 2025-2026 fee PDF shows College of Engineering graduate tuition at USD 280 per credit hour.

tuition_table.notes: Official 2025-2026 tuition and fees PDF lists College of Business Administration graduate tuition at USD 200 per credit hour.
Official 2025-2026 tuition and fees PDF lists College of Engineering graduate tuition at USD 280 per credit hour.

application_fee.notes: RHU publishes a non-refundable USD 30 admission file fee.

registration_fee.notes: The current fee PDF states that the first payment includes a USD 200 registration fee.

operational_fee.notes: The current fee PDF lists a USD 300 operational fee per semester.

nssf_membership_fee.notes: The current fee PDF lists an NSSF membership fee of USD 94 per academic year.

payment_methods.summary: RHU states that students pay part of the semester charges at the beginning of the term and complete payment through the Finance Office process.
items: Semester-start payment of 25% of tuition plus other fees

payment_plans.summary: RHU offers deferred payment by signed contract with installment schedules by term.
items: Four installments for Fall and Spring semesters

scholarships.summary: RHU publishes scholarship and discount language through the Financial Aid Office and graduate assistantship provisions in the Graduate Catalog.

financial_aid.summary: RHU financial aid is handled through the Financial Aid Office and the Graduate Catalog assistantship provisions.
items: Need-based or discount-based financial aid through the Financial Aid Office
Aid subject to academic and registration conditions

academic_calendar.summary: RHU publishes its graduate academic calendar in the Graduate Catalog and on the academic calendar page.
items: Academic calendar page on the official RHU website

graduate_regulations.summary: The Graduate Catalog covers the graduate academic rules for period of study, supervision, course load, grades, plan of study, standing, assistantship, and graduation.

notes: No explicit accreditation statement was recovered from the reviewed official RHU sources in this pass.

international_students.summary: RHU's Graduate Catalog includes passport and visa guidance for international students, alongside the general graduate admission requirements.
items: Comply with applicable Lebanese immigration rules
